issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.

Must be one of: AppCompatDelegate.MODE_NIGHT_NO, AppCompatDelegate.MODE_NIGHT_YES, AppCompatDelegate.MODE_NIGHT_AUTO_TIME, AppCompatDelegate.MODE_NIGHT_FOLLOW_SYSTEM, AppCompatDelegate.MODE_NIGHT_UNSPECIFIED, AppCompatDelegate.MODE_NIGHT_AUTO_BATTERY
Must be one or more of: Gravity.LEFT, Gravity.RIGHT, GravityCompat.START, GravityCompat.END, Gravity.NO_GRAVITY
Must be one or more of: Gravity.LEFT, Gravity.RIGHT, GravityCompat.START, GravityCompat.END, Gravity.NO_GRAVITY
Must be one or more of: Gravity.LEFT, Gravity.RIGHT, GravityCompat.START, GravityCompat.END, Gravity.NO_GRAVITY
Must be one or more of: Gravity.LEFT, Gravity.RIGHT, GravityCompat.START, GravityCompat.END, Gravity.NO_GRAVITY
Must be one or more of: Gravity.LEFT, Gravity.RIGHT, GravityCompat.START, GravityCompat.END, Gravity.NO_GRAVITY

This intent filter has the format of an Android App Link but is missing the `autoVerify` attribute; add `android:autoVerify="true"` to ensure your domain will be validated and enable App Link-related Lint warnings. If you do not want clicked URLs to bring the user to your app, remove the `android.intent.category.BROWSABLE` category, or set `android:autoVerify="false"` to make it clear this is not intended to be an Android App Link.

This intent filter has the format of an Android App Link but is missing the `autoVerify` attribute; add `android:autoVerify="true"` to ensure your domain will be validated and enable App Link-related Lint warnings. If you do not want clicked URLs to bring the user to your app, remove the `android.intent.category.BROWSABLE` category, or set `android:autoVerify="false"` to make it clear this is not intended to be an Android App Link.

This intent filter has the format of an Android App Link but is missing the `autoVerify` attribute; add `android:autoVerify="true"` to ensure your domain will be validated and enable App Link-related Lint warnings. If you do not want clicked URLs to bring the user to your app, remove the `android.intent.category.BROWSABLE` category, or set `android:autoVerify="false"` to make it clear this is not intended to be an Android App Link.

This intent filter has the format of an Android App Link but is missing the `autoVerify` attribute; add `android:autoVerify="true"` to ensure your domain will be validated and enable App Link-related Lint warnings. If you do not want clicked URLs to bring the user to your app, remove the `android.intent.category.BROWSABLE` category, or set `android:autoVerify="false"` to make it clear this is not intended to be an Android App Link.
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
The Network Security Configuration allows the use of user certificates in the release version of your app
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 28. Merge all the resources in this folder into `font`.
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 28. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This field leaks a context object
issue.errorLine1: abstract class StatusViewModel(private val context: Context) : ViewModel() {

issue.message: Nested weights are bad for performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:attr/selectableItemBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Qbit`)

Hardcoded string "Category (pick or type a new one)", should use `@string` resource
